query:
ALTER TABLE `petition_signatures` 
ADD COLUMN `cnf` varchar(20) NOT NULL AFTER `fullName`,
ADD COLUMN `whatsapp` varchar(20) NOT NULL AFTER `cnf`,
DROP COLUMN `phone`,
DROP COLUMN `city`,
DROP COLUMN `state`,
ADD UNIQUE KEY `petition_signatures_cnf_unique` (`cnf`);
